About Me

🎓 NIT + IIT Madras

Hi! I'm Sanjib Maity, a final-year B.Tech student at NIT Durgapur pursuing a parallel B.Sc. in Data Science from IIT Madras. I work at the intersection of data engineering, predictive modeling, and business intelligence.

With hands-on internship experience at Tata Steel, Supersmelter, and City Explorer (London, Remote), I've built production-ready data workflows, regression models, and analytical dashboards for real industrial datasets. I'm also a proud participant in the McKinsey Forward Program.

Customer Segmentation & Shipping Cost Optimization – Walmart
PythonSQLscikit-learnPower BIK-MeansRidge Regression

  • Ridge Regression (R²: 0.56); unit price as top cost driver (correlation: 0.74).
  • K-Means clustering → 5 customer segments with targeted marketing recommendations.
